summary: Elon Musk's comment came after a post from cybersecurity consultant Lukasz Olejnik. The cybersecurity consultant had said, ‘Amazon is holding a mandatory meeting about AI breaking its systems.’

title: WhatsApp launches parent managed account feature: How it works, how to use and more
summary: WhatsApp is launching 'parent-managed accounts' for pre-teens, allowing parents to control their children's interactions while ensuring privacy through end-to-end encryption. The setup requires both devices to link accounts, and a Parent PIN secures privacy settings.

title: iQOO Z11x with 7,200 mAh battery and Dimensity 7400 SoC launched in India, price starts at ₹18,999
summary: iQOO has launched the Z11x 5G in India, featuring a 7200mAh battery, dual rear cameras, and a 6.76-inch Full HD+ display. Prices start at ₹18,999, offering models with up to 256GB storage, and the device supports military-grade durability and 4K video recording.

title: Adobe adds AI assistant to Photoshop, upgrades Firefly with new generative tools
summary: Adobe is launching a beta AI assistant for Photoshop on web and mobile, allowing paid users unlimited generations until April 9. The assistant simplifies editing tasks through voice or text commands, while Firefly Image Editor receives updates for improved image manipulation.

title: Google turns Chrome into an AI browser with Gemini support in India — top features, how to use and more
summary: Google is enhancing Chrome with Gemini AI integration. The feature is now available to users in India, Canada, and New Zealand. The AI can be used to summarize content, draft emails, and edit images.&nbsp;

title: Xiaomi 17, Xiaomi 17 Ultra with LEICA camera setup launched in India: Price, specs, launch offers and more
summary: Xiaomi launched the 17 series in India, featuring LTPO 120Hz displays, Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 processors, and LEICA camera setup. The Xiaomi 17 starts at ₹89,999, while the Ultra model begins at ₹1,39,999

summary: The discussions are early and the fundraising targets could change, said the people, who asked not to be identified discussing private information. The money would be spread across several vehicles, including the company’s growth and early-stage venture funds, one of the people said.

summary: The department had sent a draft rule, to replace a January 2025 Biden-era regulation on global access to AI chips, to other agencies for feedback late last ‌month.

title: Digg cuts jobs after facing AI bot surge
summary: CEO Justin Mezzell said in a blog post on Friday that ‌the company ⁠is downsizing ⁠its team to a small core group after failing to find ​product-market fit against established social media platforms.

title: Uber cofounder Kalanick launches Atoms in specialised robotics push
summary: Kalanick is betting that task-specific machines are the key ‌to improving ⁠industrial productivity. ⁠He is expanding and renaming City Storage Systems, the startup ​he started building after leaving the ride-hailing giant.

title: Apple MacBook Neo emerges as company's most repairable laptop in more than a decade
summary: iFixit publishes repair guides and sells parts and tools for consumer electronic devices, but also provides ratings for how easy items are to fix and ‌keep running. ⁠Laptop makers ⁠such as Dell Tech and Lenovo Group have used those ratings to improve the repairability of their products.

title: TikTok investors set to pay $10 billion fee to Trump administration
summary: The fee, which the U.S. government is considering a transaction fee for its role in helping bring about the deal, will be paid by new investors in the U.S. TikTok, according to two people briefed on the matter who were not authorized to speak publicly about the transaction.

title: Meta plans sweeping layoffs that could impact over 20% of workforce
summary: Top executives have recently signaled the plans to other senior leaders at Meta and told them ‌to begin planning how ⁠to ⁠pare back, two of the people said. The sources spoke anonymously because they were not authorized to disclose the cuts.

title: Europe takes first step to banning AI-generated child sexual abuse images
summary: Governments and regulators ​from Europe to Asia are cracking down on sexually ​explicit content generated by Elon Musk's xAI chatbot Grok on X as well as ​sexually intimate deepfakes produced by ⁠Grok.

title: Adobe CEO Shantanu Narayen to step down after 18 years
summary: Adobe said the board has started the process of identifying the next CEO and will consider both internal and external candidates. "Leading Adobe has been the privilege of a lifetime," Narayen said.
